title: Vivian — first meeting at the Notice Board (Stage 1)
prompt: A young woman is already at the Notice Board, leaning against the marble alcove wall, reading a posting. She glances over at the sound of the door — takes in the gray gown, the empty hands, the whole situation — in about a second. "Pulling a contract, are we? Brave." She tilts her head, a small grin spreading. "You're new-new. Just up from the Church floor?" Before he can answer she's already moving past him. "Don't worry, soldier — everyone gets a first time. I'm Vivian. I might see you out there. Try not to die in the first room." She's gone before he can find a word for her.

choices.label: Watch her leave (witness — no spoken response)
choices.resolutionHint: Hero says nothing. Vivian's already gone. The room feels smaller now without her. First flicker of affection registered (she liked that he didn't try to be clever).

choices.label: Call after her — try to be clever
choices.resolutionHint: Hero says something — anything — too late and too loud. Vivian's laugh floats back from the corridor. She liked it less than the silence would have, but she liked it.
